title: P5-02 Privacy Policy presence module
acceptance_criteria: Detect privacy-policy link from crawled HTML ONLY (cheerio over crawl.cleanedHtml/renderedHtml/html): anchor text matching privacy/data-protection/datenschutz/privacidad/privacy policy AND href patterns (/privacy, /privacy-policy, /legal/privacy, /data-protection)
Presence + prominence (in footer/nav) only — NO fetch of the policy page, NO content-quality judgement (explicitly deferred)
Emit factual signal: link observed (INFO) or not observed (signal finding, no verdict). FAIL-CLOSED to 'not evaluated' INFO when no DOM is available (fetch-only with empty html)
moduleId 'P5-02', category 'Privacy & Compliance'; regulation refs as context only; no attestation wording
Pure function — NO new outbound network request
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
